title: dolichothele longimamma f. gigantothele
side_effects: Dolichothele longimamma f. gigantothele can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. In severe cases, improper use can also lead to gastrointestinal issues, such as nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Overexposure to the plant's toxic compounds may cause neurological problems, including dizziness, confusion, and even seizures. Furthermore, uncontrolled use can also result in cardiovascular issues, including rapid heartbeat and a drop in blood pressure.
